verses.1: God, the nations have come into your inheritance.
verses.2: They have given the dead bodies of your servants to be food for the birds of the sky,
verses.3: They have shed their blood like water around Jerusalem.
verses.4: We have become a reproach to our neighbors,
verses.6: Pour out your wrath on the nations that don’t know you,
verses.8: Don’t hold the iniquities of our forefathers against us.
verses.9: Help us, God of our salvation, for the glory of your name.
verses.10: Why should the nations say, “Where is their God?”
verses.11: Let the sighing of the prisoner come before you.
verses.12: Pay back to our neighbors seven times into their bosom
verses.13: So we, your people and sheep of your pasture,
